license_or_terms: Creative Commons-Non Commercial 4.0 per official ChaosNLI repository README/LICENSE.
citation: Nie, Y., Zhou, X., & Bansal, M. (2020). What Can We Learn from Collective Human Opinions on Natural Language Inference Data? EMNLP. Official repository: https://github.com/easonnie/ChaosNLI
download_or_source_notes: Downloaded chaosNLI_v1.0.zip from the Dropbox URL linked in the official ChaosNLI README. Expanded label_counter counts to synthetic per-item rater rows because released files provide counts, not individual annotator IDs.
notes_on_label_independence: Each example has 100 newly collected annotations according to the official documentation; individual annotator IDs are not released, so rater IDs are synthetic within item.
known_biases_or_filters: Primary mode is reference-distribution recovery only. No majority/consensus label is used as gold.
